_note: Manual cert-price overrides decided by GIMI management that supersede the V68 deck / Training Prices sheet. These are the source of truth for the listed product codes' CERT (self-paced) price. Reason: round-hundred cert prices were nudged +$10 so they end in $X10, consistent with the rest of the catalogue. Training-tier prices are unchanged. Masterclasses (CIP-MC $2,000, CCIO-MC $2,600) were intentionally left as-is.
